evals.prompt:

# Skills by Frad ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Claude-Skills-blue)

[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) [![Twitter Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/FradSer?style=social)](https://twitter.com/FradSer)

evals.expected_output: Updated README.md and README.zh-CN.md that accurately list all skills (apple-events, tropes, update-readme) with correct installation commands, proper header format, and consistent bilingual content

evals.prompt: The README is out of date. I just added a new skill called 'update-readme' to the skills/ folder. Please update both README.md and README.zh-CN.md to reflect the current state of the project at /Users/FradSer/Developer/FradSer/skills.
evals.expected_output: Both README files updated to include the new update-readme skill with a description, installation command, and no stale content

evals.prompt: Sync my bilingual README files with the repo. Check what skills are actually in the repo under skills/ and make sure README.md and README.zh-CN.md both match. Header badges should reflect the actual tools used (chezmoi, zsh, etc. if relevant, otherwise appropriate alternatives).
evals.expected_output: Both README files are in sync, covering all and only the skills that exist, with accurate badge choices and consistent structure between EN and ZH versions
